description: Phase 3 production wiring verification. Each boolean field is backed by a real test that exercises the production HTTP/SSE path end-to-end.

rag_engine_default_pipeline_enabled.evidence: Default RAGEngine() creates a CalculationPipeline instance and injects it into RAGOrchestrator.

http_query_exposes_calculations.evidence: POST /query returns QueryResponse with non-empty calculations array for calculation requests.

http_stream_executes_calculation_pipelin.evidence: POST /query/stream unified path calls engine.query() and the done SSE event carries calculations.

http_stream_bypasses_llm_on_executed.evidence: EXECUTED calculation does not invoke engine.generate_answer_stream; deterministic answer emitted as token event.

http_stream_bypasses_llm_on_blocked.evidence: BLOCKED calculation does not invoke engine.generate_answer_stream.

http_stream_bypasses_llm_on_failed.evidence: FAILED calculation does not invoke engine.generate_answer_stream.

public_payload_excludes_internal_error_m.evidence: FAILED CalculationResponse schema has no error_message field; to_public_dict() omits error_message.

public_payload_limits_evidence_excerpt.evidence: CalculationOperandResponse uses evidence_excerpt (<=240 chars via _safe_excerpt) instead of full source_text.

production_paths_verified: POST /query/stream -> unified engine.query() path -> SSE done event with calculations
Public payload sanitized (no error_message, truncated evidence_excerpt)
